step.title: Document change
step.action: Document the requested change clearly: what is changing, why, and who requested it.

step.title: Impact analysis
step.action: Analyze the impact of the change on existing stories, architecture, and sprint scope.

step.title: Scope assessment
step.action: Assess the effort required and determine if the change fits within the current sprint or requires replanning.

step.title: Recommendation
step.action: Provide a recommendation: approve, defer, or reject the change with rationale.

step.title: Produce CR doc
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with change request details.
